message:
fix(core,pager): harden commit-marker tamper detection and fix persist-before-validate bug

commit_marker: verify BLAKE3-based marker_id after xxh3 checksum in
both valid_record_prefix_count and recover_valid_prefix, closing a
forgery vector where an attacker could recompute the non-cryptographic
xxh3 after altering record fields. Add MarkerIdMismatch error variant.

epoch: reorder bootstrap_native_mode_with_recovery to validate the
recovered root pointer BEFORE persisting it to ecs/root, preventing
permanent corruption if validation fails on a bogus pointer that was
already written to disk.

pager: deduplicate snapshot publishing by moving
publish_committed_snapshot_from_inner into SimpleTransaction; remove
redundant .into_iter() on return_pages_to_freelist calls.

btree: add #[expect] for clippy::too_many_arguments on balance_quick
with documented reason.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -200,6 +200,10 @@ pub fn balance_deeper<W: PageWriter>(
 ///
 /// Returns `Ok(Some(new_page))` if successful, or `Ok(None)` if the
 /// parent page is full and cannot accept the divider cell.
+#[expect(
+    clippy::too_many_arguments,
+    reason = "quick-balance operates on explicit B-tree state rather than an aggregate config"
+)]
 pub fn balance_quick<W: PageWriter>(
     cx: &Cx,
     writer: &mut W,
